author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(devDeps): update shelljs (#4991)
body:
I updated to 0.8.4, not yet 0.8.5, as it doesn't appear in the changelog yet.

This prevents the node deprecation warnings:

```
(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'cat' of module exports inside circular dependency
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'cd' of module exports inside circular dependency
(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'chmod' of module exports inside circular dependency

(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'ls' of module exports inside circular dependency

(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'tail' of module exports inside circular dependency
(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'test' of module exports inside circular dependency
(node:98762) Warning: Accessing non-existent property 'to' of module exports inside circular dependency
```
